cannot-carry.non-player-chest: Carryable Chests: only player chests can be carried.
cannot-carry.open-chest: Carryable Chests: close the chest before carrying it.
cannot-carry.in-transition: Carryable Chests: this chest is already being moved.
cannot-carry.inventory-full: Carryable Chests: your inventory is full.
cannot-carry.remove-world-failed: Carryable Chests: failed to remove the chest from the world.
cannot-carry.add-inventory-failed: Carryable Chests: failed to add the chest to your inventory.
multiplayer.host-pickup-only: Carryable Chests: multiplayer sync is unavailable, so only the host can pick up this chest.
multiplayer.host-place-only: Carryable Chests: multiplayer sync is unavailable, so only the host can place this chest.
multiplayer.pickup-rejected: Carryable Chests: the host rejected your pickup request.
multiplayer.place-rejected: Carryable Chests: the host rejected your placement request.
command.reconcile.summary: Re-scan carried chests and repair durable carried state.
config.maximum-reach.name: Maximum Reach
config.maximum-reach.tooltip: How far away a chest can be picked up from.
config.require-empty-hands.name: Require Empty Hands
config.require-empty-hands.tooltip: If enabled, your hands must be empty before picking up a chest.
config.open-held-chest.name: Open Held Chest
config.open-held-chest.tooltip: If enabled, right-click opens the chest you're carrying.
config.heavy-chest-slowdown.name: Heavy Chest Slowdown
config.heavy-chest-slowdown.tooltip: Settings for slowing the player while carrying fuller chests.
config.heavy-chest-slowdown.enabled.name: Enabled
config.heavy-chest-slowdown.enabled.tool: Whether heavy chest slowdown is enabled.
config.slowdown-starts-at.name: Starts At
config.slowdown-starts-at.tooltip: Chest fill percentage before slowdown starts.
config.max-speed-penalty.name: Max Penalty
config.max-speed-penalty.tooltip: Maximum speed penalty when the carried chest is full.
config.show-slowdown-icon.name: Show Icon
config.show-slowdown-icon.tooltip: If enabled, show the slowdown debuff icon in the UI.
buff.heavy-chest-slowdown.name: Heavy Chest
buff.heavy-chest-slowdown.description: The chest you're carrying is slowing you down.
